## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `python -m compileall main.py src test_main.py`
- [ ] Added or updated tests for algorithm behavior changes
- [ ] Documented test limitations when no automated test applies
- [ ] Verified expected coverage, capacity, assignments, or visualization behavior

## Data and Screenshots

- [ ] Used only a reproducible, non-private sample schema or dataset
- [ ] Removed private coordinates, credentials, local paths, and generated outputs
- [ ] Added before-and-after screenshots for visualization changes, when applicable

## Documentation and Attribution

- [ ] Updated English documentation and concise Chinese documentation when behavior changed
- [ ] Preserved existing team and course attribution
